title: DeploymentConfigSpec
description: Specification for the desired deployment behavior.

replicas.description: The desired number of pod replicas.

selector.description: Label selector for pods managed by this deployment.

triggers.description: Triggers that cause new deployments to be created.

minReadySeconds.description: Minimum number of seconds a newly created pod should be ready without any of its containers crashing before considered available.

revisionHistoryLimit.description: Number of old ReplicationControllers to retain for rollback.

paused.description: Indicates that the deployment config is paused and new deployments will not be triggered.

test.description: If true, deployments are scaled down to zero after the deployment completes.
